heroHeadline: IDF Fires Tear Gas at Palestinian Youth in Hebron Raid as WHO Vehicle Attack Death Toll Stands
heroSubtitle: Israeli soldiers fired tear gas at Palestinian youth during a military raid in Hebron, West Bank on April 6, 2026. Earlier, IDF forces struck a clearly marked WHO humanitarian vehicle in southern Gaza, killing one person. Gaza Phase 2 ceasefire negotiations remain frozen.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
